# Autism Parenting Center

> A free resource hub for autism parents, teachers, and therapists at autismparentingcenter.com.

## Pages

- [Home](https://autismparentingcenter.com/): Overview of all resources on the site.
- [Books](https://autismparentingcenter.com/books.html): Educational books by Autism Parenting Center and recommended reads for autism families.
- [Social Story & Visual Schedule Creator](https://autismparentingcenter.com/social-stories.html): Free browser-based tool to create printable social stories and visual schedules using photos and captions. No account needed.
- [Support Organization Directory](https://autismparentingcenter.com/directory.html): Directory of autism support organizations across the US, filterable by state and category.
- [Contact](https://autismparentingcenter.com/contact.html): Contact form for the Autism Parenting Center team.

## Our Books

### Core Words for Visual Learners Series
Books that teach high-frequency core vocabulary words through visual learning.
- Core Words for Visual Learners: Want — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0C12GM7K9
- Core Words for Visual Learners: Up — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BP9S3C3J
- Core Words for Visual Learners: Go — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BMSKYPFK
- Core Words for Visual Learners: Open — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BMSXW4MG

### Wh-Question Books
Books that help children understand and answer who, what, where, when, and why questions.
- A Book About Who? — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0CTMK96MX
- Another Book About What? — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0CTKQB5BT
- A Book About What? — https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0CSW17296

## Recommended Books

### Carrie Carrello
Autism parent and author known for honest, heartfelt writing about life with autism.
- What Color Is Monday? — https://amzn.to/4mRi1Qb
- Someone I Know Has Autism — https://amzn.to/4e7YuZu
- Half My Sky — https://amzn.to/4cJ9aLw

### More Great Reads
- We're Not Broken — Eric Garcia — https://amzn.to/4u3cesY
- I Am Autistic: An Interactive Workbook — Chanelle Moriah — https://amzn.to/42xjNMQ
